sub_areas.name: Python
levels: Aware: Understands Python basics and can modify existing scripts with guidance.
Applied: Builds maintainable modules and APIs using Python best practices.
Advanced: Designs scalable Python services and mentors teammates.
Expert: Defines engineering standards and leads complex Python architecture decisions.

sub_areas.name: JavaScript
levels: Aware: Understands language fundamentals and can make small UI fixes.
Applied: Builds interactive features with modern JavaScript patterns.
Advanced: Optimizes performance and drives frontend architecture decisions.
Expert: Leads cross-team JavaScript platform standards and strategy.

sub_areas.name: System Design
levels: Aware: Understands core design concepts and can contribute to discussions.
Applied: Designs small services with clear boundaries and data models.
Advanced: Designs distributed systems with reliability and scalability in mind.
Expert: Sets architecture direction and resolves ambiguous trade-offs at scale.

sub_areas.name: Testing Strategy
levels: Aware: Writes basic unit tests for straightforward logic.
Applied: Creates effective test suites across unit and integration layers.
Advanced: Improves quality pipelines with robust automation and risk-based coverage.
Expert: Defines organization-wide testing strategy and quality governance.
